title: 你吃药了吗？
description_uz: «Nima bo'ldi? Rangda yo'qsan.» — kasal bo'lib qolgan do'sti haqida tashvishlanayotgan suhbat. Bu dialog kasallik belgilarini aytish, yordam taklif qilish va yo'l so'rashni o'rgatadi. Tanish mavzu, shifokorga borishda kerak bo'ladigan foydali so'zlar. Rol o'ynash va gapirishga ishonch hosil qilish uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Что случилось? Ты бледный.» — разговор о друге, который заболел. Этот диалог учит описывать симптомы, предлагать помощь и спрашивать дорогу. Близкая тема, полезная лексика для визита к врачу. Отлично для ролевых игр и уверенности в речи.
description_en: «What's wrong? You look pale.» — a worried exchange about a friend who's fallen ill. This dialogue teaches describing symptoms, offering help, and asking for directions. Familiar topic, vocabulary you'll need at the doctor's. Great for role-play and building speaking confidence.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zěn me le? Liǎn sè bú tài hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Senga nima bo'ldi? Rangging unchalik yaxshi emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что с тобой? Ты неважно выглядишь.
sentences.text_translation_en: What's wrong? You don't look well.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ tóu téng, hái yǒu diǎn fā shāo.
sentences.text_translation: Boshim og'riyapti, biroz isitmam ham bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: У меня болит голова, и ещё немного температура.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have a headache, and I have a slight fever too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Méi yǒu. Wǒ xiǎng qù yí xià yī yuàn.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет. Я хочу сходить в больницу.
sentences.text_translation_en: No. I want to go to the hospital.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Bú yòng, wǒ zì jǐ qù.
sentences.text_translation_en: No need, I'll go by myself.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ fā shāo duō shao dù?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那很高。你最好快点去吧。
sentences.pinyin: Nà hěn gāo. Nǐ zuì hǎo kuài diǎn qù ba.
sentences.text_translation: Bu juda baland. Tezroq borganing ma'qul.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это высоко. Тебе лучше поскорее пойти.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's high. You'd better go quickly.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo. Yī yuàn yuǎn bu yuǎn?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Bù yuǎn, zuò chē shí fēn zhōng jiù dào.
sentences.text_translation: Uzoq emas, mashinada o'n daqiqada yetib borasan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не далеко, на машине десять минут — и ты на месте.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not far, ten minutes by car and you're there.
sentences.speaker: A
